name: William Hartley
title: Chief Executive Officer & Chief Investment Officer
bio: Founded Fortis Banking Group 24 years ago with focus on institutional asset management. Transformed firm into leading $185B alternative investment manager across credit, real estate, and infrastructure.

name: Rebecca Thompson
title: Head of Credit Investments
bio: Leads $78B credit platform managing corporate bonds, leveraged loans, and structured credit. 23 years credit investing expertise with deep relationships across investment banking community.

name: James O'Connor
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Leveraged Loans
bio: Manages $45B leveraged loan fund with focus on middle-market corporate debt. 19 years debt market experience with exceptional track record in covenant analysis and credit selection.

name: Daniela Schmidt
title: Head of Private Equity & Co-Investments
bio: Leads private equity platform with $52B in committed capital. 21 years PE investing experience with expertise in LBO structuring and operational value creation.

name: Singapore Tan
title: Portfolio Manager - Real Estate Debt
bio: Manages $35B real estate debt strategy across commercial and residential properties. 17 years real estate finance expertise with deep property market knowledge across major geographies.

name: Caroline Durand
title: Credit Analyst - Structured Products
bio: Specializes in complex structured credit analysis including CLOs, RMBS, and CMBS. 13 years structured credit expertise with proprietary valuation models for complex securities.

name: Michael Okonkwo
title: Trader - Credit Markets
bio: Executes multi-billion dollar credit trading operations globally. 16 years trading experience with focus on execution excellence and best execution practices across credit markets.

name: Sophia Papadopoulos
title: Strategist - Credit Markets
bio: Provides strategic guidance on credit markets and economic outlooks. 18 years research and strategy experience with publications in leading financial journals.

name: Tony Lin
title: Analyst - Distressed Debt & Restructuring
bio: Identifies distressed credit opportunities and restructuring situations. 12 years distressed investing with track record of identifying value in undervalued credit positions.

name: Ariana Rossi
title: Risk Manager
bio: Manages credit risk framework across $185B portfolio. 14 years risk management with expertise in credit risk modeling, portfolio stress testing, and recovery rate estimation.
